title: CATpack
description:
A good performance with a fresh Minecraft experience.
Based on Additive.
body:
### Modpack is currently frozen, waiting for mod developers to update their mods to the Minecraft 26.1 version

### **_WARNING_**

**_I DO NOT OWN ANY OF MODS, RESOURCEPACKS, DATAPACKS OR SHADERS USED IN THIS MODPACK, ALL OF THEM BELONG TO THEIR AUTHORS ON MODRINTH OR GITHUB, YOU CAN FIND ALL LINKS/CREDITS IN THE SOURCE_**

**_I RECOMMEND READING THIS PAGE BEFORE PLAYING THIS MODPACK_**

### **Main rules of this modpack**

1. **The main purpose of this modpack is to get a good performance with a fresh minecraft experience.**

2. **Vanilla-friendly mods, your friend does not need to download this modpack to join you. _(!)_**

3. **Being always up-to-date.**

**_(!)_ - Your friend will probably need to download [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) to join you**
> **Did an exception for this mod because of how good it is**

### **Some information**

- **Supporting only the latest version of Minecraft**

- **Use only the latest version of this modpack, old versions are not supported**

- **I recommend using GraalVM or Temurin as JVM to get the best performance, but other ones are fine too (OpenJDK for an example)**

- **I recommend using 4GB of RAM, but it should work fine with 2GB of RAM too**

- **Recommended JVM flags ([PaperMC start script generator](https://docs.papermc.io/misc/tools/start-script-gen)):**
```
-XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=8M -XX:G1HeapWastePercent=5 -XX:G1MaxNewSizePercent=40 -XX:G1MixedGCCountTarget=4 -XX:G1MixedGCLiveThresholdPercent=90 -XX:G1NewSizePercent=30 -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent=5 -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent=15 -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 -XX:MaxTenuringThreshold=1 -XX:SurvivorRatio=32 -Dusing.aikars.flags=https://mcflags.emc.gs -Daikars.new.flags=true
```

- **Also personally I recommend using Prism Launcher as your Minecraft launcher to manage modpacks easily**

### **Guide for the best experience**

- **New recipe - Pocket Dimension:**

![Pocket Dimension recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c8320a0327998475ac7c7ed8f60960c60487397.png)

- **Pick up and move chests and barrels:**

![Haul preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/maybejake/haul/refs/heads/main/haul%20demo%20short.gif)
 
- **You can use "Clist" by pressing "B" and "M", press "J" to hide waypoints**
 
- **Press "C" to zoom**

- **I recommend choosing large biomes when creating a new world**
 
- **Use `/function #tschipcraft:menu` to configure "More Mobs"**
 
- **Use `/function wither:config` to configure "Wither's Wrath"**

- **Use `/function true_ending:_settings` to configure "True Ending - Ender Dragon Overhaul"**

- **Use `/function vanilla_refresh:_settings` to configure "Vanilla Refresh"**

### **Mods you may want to install with this modpack**

- **[Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) - record your Minecraft gameplay**

- **[voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy) - see more chunks using LoD**

- **[Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) - a client-side schematic mod**

- **[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance**

- **[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - a proximity voice chat for Minecraft (voice sounds physics are available with this modpack)**

### **Known issues/incompatibilities**

- **Some shaders work incorrectly with some first person animations**

- **"Pocket Dimensions" may have some visual bugs in a multiplayer, when you "Open to LAN", a help of another player may be needed in certain scenarios, also you can restart a world to fix issues related to "Pocket Dimensions"**

- **Two different songs will play while the ender dragon fight, but the one is quieter than another one usually, it depends on your music and sounds settings, you can workaround this problem by disabling music in `/function true_ending:_settings`**

- **Vanilla entity shadows work incorrectly with some shaders, just disable vanilla entity shadows in settings in this case**

- **No support for "Create", you may want to delete "Immersive Optimization" in this modpack to have a proper support for "Create"**

- **"Open to LAN" does not work properly with "ViaFabricPlus" installed, you still can install "ViaFabricPlus", if you do not plan to use "Open to LAN" in your local worlds**

### **Missing mods**

- **"ViaFabricPlus", causes weird bugs related to "Open to LAN"**
